name: The End - FPE AU
description:
"If the world was ending I'd wanna be next to you."

After long years have passed, all that remains are the bleak ruins. Δlice stands alone in this dilapidated land, reminiscing about the earlier days once full of bright colors and all bowing their heads before the demon in awe.

No matter how long you stare at the place, the disappeared stays silent.
